sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103126" key="teratoskopi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τερᾰτο-σκοπία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n103126.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">interpretation of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέρατα</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:188" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.188</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
